news.headline: NTPC adds 5,488 MW renewable energy capacity in FY26
news.summary: NTPC Group has added 5,488 MW of renewable energy capacity during FY26 across solar, wind and pumped storage projects, strengthening its clean energy portfolio.

news.headline: JSW Energy commissions 250 MW of renewable energy capacity, including hydro, since April 2026
news.summary: JSW Energy has commissioned 250 MW of renewable energy capacity since April 2026, comprising 130 MW of wind, 69.4 MW of solar, and the 50 MW Tidong Hydro Plant. With this addition, its total installed power generation capacity has reached 13.7 GW.

news.headline: Inox Clean buys US assets of Boviet Solar
news.summary: Through this asset purchase, Inox Clean gains an operational capacity of 3 GW of TOPCon solar module manufacturing in the United States, positioning it in line with the “Make in America, For America” initiative.
